title: Tijara Jain Temple
tagline: Tijara Jain Temple — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: Tijara Jain Temple is a digambar Jain temple dedicated to Chandraprabhu.
overview.description: Tijara Jain Temple is a digambar Jain temple dedicated to Chandraprabhu. The temple is located in the hill city Tijara, in the Khairthal-Tijara district of Rajasthan, India. It is an Atishaya Kshetra (English: Place where Miracles happen). It is 55 kilometres (34 mi) from Alwar and 110 kilometres (68 mi) from Delhi.

topPlaces.name: Tijara
topPlaces.description: Tijara is a city and a municipality in Khairthal-Tijara district of the Indian state of Rajasthan. Tijara comes under the NCR area and is situated 55 km to the northeast of Alwar.

topPlaces.name: Lal Masjid, Tijara
topPlaces.description: The Lal Masjid (lit. 'Red Mosque') is a mosque located in Tijara, in the state of Rajasthan, India. It is listed as a monument of national importance.

items.note: Tijara is a city and a municipality in Khairthal-Tijara district of the Indian state of Rajasthan. Tijara comes under the NCR area and is situated 55 km to the northeast of Alwar.
The Lal Masjid (lit. 'Red Mosque') is a mosque located in Tijara, in the state of Rajasthan, India. It is listed as a monument of national importance.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tijara Jain Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tijara Jain Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tijara Jain Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Indira Gandhi International Airport, Delhi (74 km) and the nearest railway station is New Delhi Railway Station (87 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tijara Jain Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tijara Jain Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tijara Jain Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tijara Jain Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tijara Jain Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tijara, Lal Masjid, Tijara.
